# Daily Report ŌĆö 2026-04-15

## Task Completed
Implemented the `create_user_criteria_condition` tool.

This tool completes the user-criteria workflow by linking an existing
`user_criteria` record to a Service Catalog entity (item, category, or
catalog) via the appropriate ServiceNow junction table.  Two visibility
modes are supported:

* `can_see` (default, allow-list) ŌĆö creates a record in the `*_mtom` table,
  granting access to users who match the criteria.
* `cannot_see` (deny-list) ŌĆö creates a record in the `*_no_mtom` table,
  blocking access for users who match the criteria.

All six junction tables are covered:

| entity_type    | visibility   | Table                                  |
|----------------|--------------|----------------------------------------|
| catalog_item   | can_see      | sc_cat_item_user_criteria_mtom         |
| catalog_item   | cannot_see   | sc_cat_item_user_criteria_no_mtom      |
| category       | can_see      | sc_category_user_criteria_mtom         |
| category       | cannot_see   | sc_category_user_criteria_no_mtom      |
| catalog        | can_see      | sc_catalog_user_criteria_mtom          |
| catalog        | cannot_see   | sc_catalog_user_criteria_no_mtom       |

Changes:
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/user_criteria_tools.py` ŌĆö added
  `_ENTITY_TABLES` lookup, `CreateUserCriteriaConditionParams`,
  `UserCriteriaConditionResponse`, and `create_user_criteria_condition`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` ŌĆö exported
  `create_user_criteria_condition`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` ŌĆö imported and registered the
  new tool with its Pydantic params model
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` ŌĆö enabled `create_user_criteria_condition` in
  `catalog_builder` and `full` packages (removed TODO stubs)
- `tests/test_user_criteria_tools.py` ŌĆö 17 new tests covering all six
  entity/visibility combinations, default visibility, response content,
  API URL correctness, HTTP/connection/timeout errors, and Pydantic models

## Test Results
- Total tests: 448 passed, 4 deselected
- Coverage: 88% overall; user_criteria_tools.py 100%
- All passing: yes

## Security
No application-level vulnerabilities. System package findings (pip,
setuptools, wheel, pyjwt) are pre-existing environment issues unrelated
to this project.
